creator: johnson.peter@gmail.com
text:
Add SystemC Verification (SCV) library port, from systemc.org.  Note that
like cad/systemc, this port is RESTRICTED as you have to register to
download it.

Fix: New port structure attached.  I'm not entirely happy with the installed
permissions, as the port uses a shell script to help with the install,
and I'm not sure how to get access to the INSTALL_DATA setting from
there; I've just made it use install -m 644 (it was just doing cp before,
which resulted in even worse permissions).
How-To-Repeat: No existing port.
